name: Instagram: Post Extract
description: Open one Instagram post, reel, or IGTV URL and return identity, author, timestamp, stats, media assets, and comments. Use mode=preflight for a cheap metadata-only pass (no carousel traversal, no DOM media fallback) when you only need to filter by date, likes, or author before deciding whether to run the heavier mode=full pass.

help.summary: Extract Instagram post metadata and (optionally) media assets and comments.

parameters.name: post_url
parameters.description: Full Instagram post, reel, or tv URL (https://www.instagram.com/p/<shortcode>/ or .../reel/<shortcode>/).

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: preflight returns only hydration-derived metadata and stats and is the right choice when filtering a candidate list by date, likes, or author. full also walks the visible viewer, collects image/video asset URLs, and extracts visible comments. Defaults to full.

examples.description: Full extraction of a single post including media and comments
Cheap preflight used to decide whether to run a full pass

help.returns: post_url, shortcode, post_id, post_key, post_slug, kind (image|carousel|video|reel|tv|mixed), posted_at (ISO-8601), caption, author_handle, stats {like_count, comment_count, play_count, view_count, share_count, save_count}, image_urls, video_urls, asset_urls, asset_count, assets [{position, kind, image_url, video_url, best_url, media_id, source}], comments [{comment_id, user_handle, text, created_at, like_count, reply_count}], viewer_observed, resolved_via. In preflight mode the heavy fields (image_urls, video_urls, asset_urls, assets, comments) return empty arrays and viewer_observed reports zero carousel clicks.
notes: Requires a Chrome session that can view the target post. Private accounts without a signed-in session will yield no hydration blob.
Prefer preflight for bulk filtering: it skips the carousel walk and DOM media fallback, saving seconds and avoiding needless user gestures.
kind is inferred from the URL path first (/reel/, /tv/) and falls back to media-type heuristics.
comments are capped at 80 per post to keep payloads small; use the Instagram UI for exhaustive comment export.
If hydration fails (rate limit, challenge page) resolved_via.hydration_blob is false and full mode relies on DOM fallback selectors — treat those results as best-effort.
Opens a dedicated workflow tab (use_current_tab=false), so this workflow is safe to run in parallel with other dedicated-tab instagram flows.

browser_automation.description: Opens a dedicated workflow tab so parallel instagram runs do not collide. Navigates to one post/reel, waits for hydration, and (in full mode) steps through the visible viewer, unioning hydration metadata with DOM-visible media into one asset payload.

sequences.name: instagram_post_extract
sequences.description: Navigate to one Instagram post/reel URL and return post metadata, stats, and (in full mode) media assets and comments.

required_variables.name: post_url
required_variables.description: Full Instagram post or reel URL

steps.name: Allow the post page to settle
Allow the post page extra time to hydrate
Extract Instagram post metadata (and media in full mode)
